title: Berkshire Investors Praise Greg Abel at Post-Buffett Meeting
content: Attendees enter the convention hall during a shareholders shopping day ahead of the Berkshire Hathaway annual shareholders meeting in Omaha, Nebraska, US, on Friday, May 1, 2026. CEO Greg Abel has pledged to follow Buffett's approach to investing and managing risk - Saturday's meeting is branded with the slogan "The Legacy Continues."

text: Berkshire Investors Praise Greg Abel at Post-Buffett Meeting. Attendees enter the convention hall during a shareholders shopping day ahead of the Berkshire Hathaway annual shareholders meeting in Omaha, Nebraska, US, on Friday, May 1, 2026. CEO Greg Abel has pledged to follow Buffett's approach to investing and managing risk - Saturday's meeting is branded with the slogan "The Legacy Continues."
